## Cursor command routing

This file is the native Cursor project command for `/agtoosa-tracker`. Execute the AgToosa Tracker Sync workflow below — do **not** route to `/create-skill`.

Read `Docs/AgToosa_TrackerSync.md` and help the user run `export` or `propose` via `bash agtoosa.sh --tracker`. `Docs/Master-Plan.md` remains authoritative — never apply tracker changes without `/agtoosa-task` or `/agtoosa-spec amend`. No live provider API sync in v1.

<!-- AGTOOSA PRODUCT TRUTH START: command.tracker -->

- Canonical workflow: `Docs/AgToosa_TrackerSync.md`
- Modes: `full`, `export`, `propose`

- Approval gate: none
- Phase stop: none
